'''ây-z-j-p''' ('''kayazjepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wale|wale]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wale|wale]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-z-j-p
|-
! Lemma
| kayazjepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyazjepoko|thiyazjepoko]] || [[word:jiyazjepoko|jiyazjepoko]] || [[word:shiyazjepoko|shiyazjepoko]] || [[word:kiyazjepoko|kiyazjepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyazjepoko|thuthuyazjepoko]] || [[word:jujuyazjepoko|jujuyazjepoko]] || [[word:shushuyazjepoko|shushuyazjepoko]] || [[word:kukuyazjepoko|kukuyazjepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyazjepoko|thoyazjepoko]] || [[word:joyazjepoko|joyazjepoko]] || [[word:shoyazjepoko|shoyazjepoko]] || [[word:koyazjepoko|koyazjepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚyazjepoko|thĂŚyazjepoko]] || [[word:jĂŚyazjepoko|jĂŚyazjepoko]] || [[word:shĂŚyazjepoko|shĂŚyazjepoko]] || [[word:kĂŚyazjepoko|kĂŚyazjepoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayazjepoko|thayazjepoko]] || [[word:jayazjepoko|jayazjepoko]] || [[word:shayazjepoko|shayazjepoko]] || [[word:kayazjepoko|kayazjepoko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
